allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const f='src/App.jsx'; const t=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\); fs.writeFileSync\(f,t\);")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Content manage.ps1 | Out-Null; Write-Host 'Syntax OK'")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }')
